title: Thai Chicken Casserole
description: A fusion of Thai flavors with a classic casserole. Pungent and aromatic, this dish is perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Cook rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add roasted red peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in cooked rice noodles, italian seasoning, and spring onions.
Transfer mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
Garnish with cilantro and serve hot.
